subcodes.first_line: O divine Guardian! The Ordainer of names and true Bestower ordained thy name as Guardian of God and thy attribute as beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ولی الهی واضع اسماء و معطی حقیقی اسمت را ولی الله وضع نمود و صفتت را حبیب
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
